title: CB'S HorrorPack
body:
In this horror filled world your goal is to survive the man, and herobrine roaming the world.
Please use PSX-Shader-Master for the best retro experience.
https://github.com/ckosmic/minecraft-psx

Note: I will no longer be updating this modpack as I am creating a bigger and better version of it. Please understand! Thanks.
